title: Paccar recalls Peterbilt trucks after 6 under hood fires
text: Paccar Inc. is recalling 4,914 Peterbilt Model 579 Class 8 tractors that have experienced six under hood fires. A misplaced fastener can chafe alternator cable insulation.
